scenes.title: The Final Hour
content: The investigation is complete. The pieces fall into place with terrible clarity.
A cult. A portal. Human sacrifices to tear open the barrier between worlds.
The Mayor's family—and countless others—dragged beyond, their life force fueling an abomination that should never have been awakened.
Deep beneath the Hill Ruins, in chambers sealed for centuries, the ritual nears completion. The tremors grow stronger with each passing hour.
This ends now. One way or another.
Gather your strength. Check your gear. Say your farewells.
When you leave Redstone's walls this time, there may be no coming back.
